title: AI Search
subtitle: Intelligent Search & Retrieval System
description: Implement efficient semantic search and information retrieval capabilities within AI Agent systems, supporting multi-source data queries, relevance ranking, and result aggregation. This domain addresses how Agents rapidly locate and acquire relevant information, directly impacting decision quality and response accuracy.
sub_problems: Query Understanding & Expansion: How to transform user natural language queries into effective search signals, supporting synonym expansion, contextual enrichment, and multi-turn query optimization
Multi-Source Data Retrieval: How to uniformly integrate and query data from diverse sources (vector databases, full-text indexes, knowledge graphs, etc.) and perform result fusion
Relevance Ranking: How to design multi-dimensional ranking strategies (semantic similarity, temporal freshness, authority, etc.) to ensure the most relevant results are prioritized
Search Performance Optimization: How to guarantee low-latency search on large-scale datasets, including index optimization, caching strategies, and concurrency control
Search Result Explainability: How to provide Agents with interpretable information about search results, supporting result traceability and confidence assessment
best_practices: Adopt hybrid search strategy (BM25 + vector retrieval), combining sparse and dense representations to improve recall and precision
Implement query rewriting pipeline supporting spell correction, entity recognition, intent classification, and other preprocessing steps
Design layered index architecture, using caching for hot data and asynchronous index updates for cold data
Establish search quality evaluation framework through A/B testing and user feedback to continuously optimize ranking models
Provide metadata and source information for search results, enabling Agents to verify and trace result origins
